summary: Frontend UI testing complete. All pages load correctly and fit viewport (h-screen layout working). Navigation flows work properly. Sweet candy theme with pink gradient and glassmorphism effects implemented correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Second photo in gallery shows broken image alt text visible at top of card
ui_bugs.note: Likely test data issue - photo_data may be invalid for this test entry

passed_tests: Landing page loads with GlowBox logo and branding
Landing page fits viewport (h-screen: 1080px)
Start Photobooth button visible and clickable
View Gallery button visible and clickable
Navigation: Landing -> Frame Selection works
Frame Selection page loads with 9 frames
Frame categories (Semua, Polos, K-POP, Music, Anime, Cute) work
Frame selection shows preview on right panel
Continue to capture button appears after frame selection
Frame Selection fits viewport (h-screen)
Capture page loads with webcam container
Capture page shows 'Menyiapkan kamera...' loading state
Capture button, AR filter toggle, back button all visible
Capture page fits viewport (h-screen)
Back navigation: Capture -> Frame Selection works
Gallery page loads and shows existing photos (2 photos)
Gallery page fits viewport (h-screen)
Back navigation: Gallery -> Home works
Mobile responsive (390x844): Landing fits viewport
Mobile responsive (390x844): Frame Selection fits viewport
Mobile responsive (390x844): Gallery fits viewport
Sweet candy pink gradient background on all pages
Floating bubbles animation present
Glassmorphism (glass-card) styling applied
context_for_next_testing_agent: All h-screen layout fixes working. Pages fit viewport without scroll. Photo capture flow requires real webcam - cannot be automated. Email and print APIs are MOCKED. Gallery has 2 test photos, one with potentially broken image data.
